title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.306 - V.F.W. Memorial Highway, portion of U.S. Highway 36 designated as (includes Livingston and Linn counties)
text:
227.306.  V.F.W. Memorial Highway, portion of U.S. Highway 36 designated as (includes Livingston and Linn counties). — The portion of United States Highway 36 within any county of the third classification with a township form of government and having a population of more than thirteen thousand but less than fifteen thousand inhabitants shall be designated the "V.F.W. Memorial Highway".
(L. 1999 S.B. 61 § 1)
